User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information, matching permission roles, display names and metadata.

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user (Firebase Auth UID).

photoURL.description: URL to the user profile photo/avatar.

role.description: Permission tier role of the user, derived from their verified email.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the profile doc was registered.

Leaderboard.title: Leaderboard Score Record
Leaderboard.description: A single race complete scorecard entry for top speeds.

playerName.description: Name of the player completing the race.

selectedCar.description: Identifier key of the high-performance car used.

topSpeed.description: Calculated top speed (in km/h) recorded during the race.

Map.title: Track Map
Map.description: Configuration metadata for a racing track circuit.

id.description: Unique slug identifying the racing track geometry map.

name.description: Display name of the racing circuit track.

difficulty.description: General AI difficult parameter of the map.

laps.description: Number of lap loops required to finish the race.

description.description: Short summary detailing track surface and visual setting.

Car.title: Racer Car
Car.description: Properties and attributes of high-performance vehicles selectable in-game.

id.description: Model key slug of the vehicle.

name.description: Display name of the sports vehicle model.

topSpeed.description: Maximum top speed index of the car.

acceleration.description: Visual indicator of 0-100 speed velocity acceleration time.

handling.description: General friction static handling steering coefficient.

colorPreset.description: Default hex color indicator for the car chassis.

class.description: The category tier rating, e.g. S-CLASS, A-CLASS.

Room.title: Matchmaking Room
Room.description: Staging room for coordinating peer synchronization in multiplayer racing grids.

roomCode.description: Unique six length uppercase alphabetic code identifier.

hostId.description: The unique creator user ID host.

map.description: Track ID selected for the multiplayer match.

status.description: Phase state indicating match progression staging.

countdown.description: Second counter remaining before triggering countdown sequence.

maxPlayers.description: Max player cap size inside lobby.

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp of the staging lobby.

RoomPlayer.title: Multiplayer Room Player
RoomPlayer.description: A single player enrolled in a matchmaking room.

uid.description: Firebase Auth User ID of the player.

photoURL.description: Avatar image URL of the player.

joinedAt.description: Epoch millisecond timestamp of joining the room.

ready.description: Whether the player is ready to race.

Live.title: Live Broadcast Staging
Live.description: The active live streaming race metadata mapping currently active race room code for automatic spectator and racer synchronization.

roomCode.description: The 6-digit active matchmaker staging room code.

/live/{docId}.description: Collection tracking active public broadcaster live streams.

/users/{userId}.description: Profiles collection mapping users or invited roles by verified emails.

/leaderboards/{docId}.description: Leaderboard records collection documenting player score records.

/maps/{mapId}.description: Seeded collection containing race track geography meta-parameters.

/cars/{carId}.description: Performance attributes definitions repository for selectable cars.

/rooms/{roomId}.description: Staging server configurations synchronized for real-time multiplayer lobbies.

/rooms/{roomId}/players/{uid}.description: Subcollection of players joined to concrete match staging room.
